display.purpose: Hero headlines, top-level dashboard titles. One per screen at most.

body.purpose: Long-form artifact prose. Cap line length at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Mode badges, captions, button text. UPPERCASE with positive tracking.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Lifted state on hover. Popovers at rest.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Color and small-property changes. Buttons, links.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Terracotta CTA for primary actions. Uppercase label, soft ink-tinted shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C4785C; color: #FAF7F2; font-family: 'Jost', 'Futura PT', 'Century Gothic', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #B56A4E; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(196, 120, 92, 0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Parchment-on-cream button for secondary actions. Same shape as primary, quieter color.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #F5F0E6; color: #2C2416; font-family: 'Jost', 'Futura PT', 'Century Gothic', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.10); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #EDE5D6; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(196, 120, 92, 0.5); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Parchment surface with quiet ink-tinted border and shadow. Default container for grouped content.
components.html:
Pre-meeting stress test

Take this thing you're leaning toward and find where it breaks before the room does.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #F5F0E6; color: #2C2416; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.10); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.08); transition: box-shadow 250ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.10); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.375rem; line-height: 1.3; color: #2C2416; margin: 0 0 12px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #2C2416; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Cream-well input with 1.5px ink-tinted border. Terracotta focus ring at 15% opacity.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-label">Session prompt<input class="ds-input" placeholder="What are you trying to decide?" /></label>
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #2C2416; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; background: #FAF7F2; color: #2C2416; font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; padding: 12px 16px; min-height: 44px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.15); border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7B8C; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #C4785C; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(196, 120, 92, 0.15); }

components.name: Mode Badge
components.description: Persona-state pill. Uppercase Jost label, parchment fill, persona color text. Accompanies the mode name word.
components.css: .ds-mode-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #F5F0E6; } .ds-mode-inquisitive { color: #D4A84B; } .ds-mode-advocate { color: #8B4D3B; } .ds-mode-encouraging { color: #C9A9A6; } .ds-mode-realistic { color: #6B7B8C; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Parchment top nav with ink links and terracotta active state. No underline, no pill, color carries the active state.
components.html:
ThinkHaven
SessionsNewAccount
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; background: #F5F0E6; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.10); } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.375rem; color: #2C2416; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #2C2416; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #C4785C; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #C4785C; }

components.name: Pathway Card
components.description: Entry-point card on /app/new. Pale tinted background per pathway, ink heading, body in serif. The system's only place where pale teal/slate/sage tones appear as fills.
components.css: .ds-pathway-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; width: 100%; max-width: 420px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.10); border-radius: 12px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 250ms ease-out, transform 250ms ease-out; } .ds-pathway-warm { background: #F3EBE2; } .ds-pathway-teal { background: #C3DED8; } .ds-pathway-slate { background: #C4CFDE; } .ds-pathway-sage { background: #D5DCBA; } .ds-pathway-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(44, 36, 22, 0.10); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-pathway-label { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #4A3D2E; } .ds-pathway-title { font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.375rem; line-height: 1.3; color: #2C2416; margin: 0; } .ds-pathway-body { font-family: 'Libre Baskerville', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #2C2416; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: ThinkHaven looks like a thoughtful expert's working surface. Warm but never decorative. Vintage-modern fusion that signals 'this was designed by someone who has thought about it for a long time, and stopped.' The user is an executive or product leader who already has a position. The interface should feel like a senior strategist's notebook, not a SaaS landing page or a chatbot wrapper. The palette is organic and earthen: cream and parchment for surfaces, terracotta for one strong accent, forest for the second, ink as the only text color. Typography pairs Jost (Futura-style geometric sans) with Libre Baskerville (a workhorse serif), so headings and prose read as different voices. The system rejects three things explicitly: generic B2B SaaS, corporate consulting deliverables, and crypto/AI-bro hype.
keyCharacteristics: Cream over white. Always tinted, never pure.
One accent doing the heavy lifting (terracotta), one supporting (forest), restrained color elsewhere.
Serif body and geometric-sans headings, not the same font for both.
Soft, warm, ink-tinted shadows. No hard drop shadows, no neon glow.
Light theme only. Dark mode is not a default and is not implemented.
Symmetry without sterility. Generous whitespace. Body line length capped at 65-75ch.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta is the only accent that earns saturation. It carries CTAs, focus rings, key links, and the Mary persona. Forest and the persona-mode colors are used in narrower roles. No two strong accents on the same screen unless one is identity (board member or persona) and the other is action.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 and #fff are forbidden in any component, background, text, or border. Cream is the only 'white.' Ink is the only 'black.'

rules.name: The Modes-Win-Over-Identity Rule
rules.body: Persona mode color (Inquisitive / Devil's Advocate / Encouraging / Realistic) overrides board-member identity color when both are present. The mode badge wears the mode color; the avatar and member accents stay in identity color.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Heading typography (Jost) and body typography (Libre Baskerville) are different voices on purpose. Never set body copy in Jost; never set headings in Baskerville. The contrast is the brand.

rules.name: The Tracking Rule
rules.body: Body and heading letter-spacing stays at 0 (or small negative tracking for display sizes). Positive tracking is reserved for all-caps labels and captions only. Wide tracking on title-case copy is forbidden.

rules.name: The Line-Length Rule
rules.body: Long-form artifact body content is capped at 65-75ch. Below this, serif body becomes claustrophobic; above this, eye-tracking breaks down between lines.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is keyed to the ink color. rgba(0, 0, 0, X) is forbidden in shadow definitions. Cool/gray shadows immediately register as off-brand.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards rest with a low shadow or no shadow at all. Hover and active states may lift to shadow-md. Reserve shadow-lg for floating UI (dialogs, dropdowns, popovers) only.

dos: Do lead every screen with cream (#FAF7F2) as the page background. Pure white is forbidden.
Do use ink (#2C2416) for all body text, ink-light (#4A3D2E) for secondary text on cream/parchment, and slate-blue (#6B7B8C) for muted UI text only.
Do pair Jost (display, geometric sans) with Libre Baskerville (body, serif). The two-voice contrast is the brand.
Do cap long-form artifact body copy at 65-75ch.
Do keep terracotta as the single strong accent. CTAs, focus rings, key links.
Do keep shadows ink-tinted (rgba(44, 36, 22, X)), warm and quiet.
Do use @radix-ui/react-dialog for every new modal (focus trap, escape, aria-modal).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: all transitions become instant, animations cease.
donts: Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) anywhere.
Don't use blue gradients, indigo accents, or the from-blue-50 to-indigo-100 Next.js starter palette.
Don't use navy + gold consulting-deck color schemes.
Don't use neon, animated gradients, glassmorphism, or any AI/crypto-bro visual cue.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, list items, or messages.
Don't use gradient text. Emphasis comes from weight and size.
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, or frosted glass cards.
Don't apply animated background gradients or scroll-driven gradient sweeps.
Don't wrap everything in a container or a card.
Don't treat dark mode as a default. Dark mode is not implemented.
Don't use bg-secondary for text or as a text-bearing background by mistake.
Don't import Mermaid, Excalidraw, or any heavy library at module scope.
Don't use bouncy or elastic motion curves.
Don't use modal as a first thought.
